meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't deploy apps (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't deploy apps. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Template to Solve Deployment Issues
content.seo_description: Learn to use the Antigravity project template to overcome deployment roadblocks. A beginner-friendly guide for students using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure is the silent killer of student projects. By using the Antigravity project template, you abstract away infrastructure complexity, allowing you to focus on application logic. Combined with Claude Code, you can automate your CI/CD pipeline, ensuring your code is production-ready from the very first commit.
content.intro:
You have spent nights perfecting your code, only to watch it vanish into the void of a failed deployment. That crushing feeling—where your local environment shines but the server remains a black box—is the rite of passage every engineer faces. You aren't failing; you are simply lacking the right architectural leverage.

The Antigravity project template acts as your structural blueprint, eliminating the 'works on my machine' syndrome. By integrating this with Claude Code, you transition from a coder struggling with configurations to a builder delivering functional software. It is time to stop debugging server environments and start shipping your vision.

steps.title: Initialize with Antigravity Template
steps.description: Clone the base template to establish a battle-tested folder structure that handles environment variables and build scripts automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the standard Antigravity starter template with TypeScript and Express support.

steps.title: Configure Environment Variables
steps.description: Securely manage sensitive API keys and database strings using the template's built-in dotenv handling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure .env.example file and provide instructions on how to populate it for a production-ready environment.

steps.title: Implement Automated Build Scripts
steps.description: Define build commands that minify your code and optimize assets for deployment efficiency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a build script that prepares the application for production by minifying assets and clearing build artifacts.

steps.title: Draft Deployment Manifest
steps.description: Use the Antigravity manifest to describe your infrastructure requirements clearly to the deployment provider.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate an antigravity.yaml manifest file optimized for a standard cloud deployment environment.

steps.title: Execute Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Trigger the final deployment sequence to push your code from your machine to the live web.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Validate the current project state and run the final push to deploy the application to the configured provider.

pro_tips: Always use a .dockerignore file even if you aren't containerizing yet; it keeps your build context clean.
Map your local development port to a consistent environment variable to avoid conflicts during multi-service builds.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your build scripts; if the build fails locally, it will never succeed on the server.
Keep your 'antigravity.yaml' file in the root directory to ensure the CLI tool can auto-detect your project settings.
Leverage the 'dry-run' flag on your deployment commands to see exactly what files are being uploaded before committing.
content.next_steps: Once your first deployment is live, monitor your logs using the Claude Code 'logs' command to identify potential bottlenecks and scale your resources accordingly.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting deployment roadblocks define your limits. Use these tools to ship faster and build a portfolio that stands out to recruiters. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
